Title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
Writer: Michael Lesslie, Paul Wernick, Rhett Reese
Actors: Jesse Eisenberg, Woody Harrelson, Dave Franco
Plot: The Four Horsemen reunite and team up with a new generation of young illusionists to expose a diamond heiress's global money laundering scheme for criminals.
Country: United States, United Arab Emirates, Canada, Hungary
